release_notes: **Broker API contract check on login**: Kite and Breeze tokens are now validated against the read-only endpoints the app depends on (margins/positions/orders for Kite; funds/portfolio/order list for Breeze) immediately after exchange. A failing check means the token is not saved, and the Auth page names which feature would have broken — catching a broken/changed broker API before the market opens instead of mid-strategy. **Carry position (DTE exit)** block in the Strategy Composer (`carry_eod`): overrides the previously-unconditional daily EOD close, letting the whole open position (not just short legs — e.g. an iron condor's wings ride with the shorts they hedge) carry overnight until a configurable DTE trigger (0 = expiry day) is reached. Not leg-scopable by design.
